description: psm/trade-secrets-management/schema.yaml cited '영업비밀보호법', not a canonical statute name (actual: 부정경쟁방지 및 영업비밀보호에 관한 법률, which could not be verified against legalize_kr). K-REACH Art 13 (CBI protection) was already tracked in the glossary and directly on-topic but unused.
legal_basis: K-REACH (화학물질등록 및 평가 등에 관한 법률) 제13조
